display_text: Forebearer's Fortune, Tier N / Non-Purchasable: Point target ability that signals commitment to honor spirits. If every ally makes an Undying Promise before battle, the dead might listen. Leaves a lingering effect in a 600 radius. Stats: Speed: 1200, Radius: 600, Linger Duration: 5.0s.
